Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable Content-Location: https://myportal.sutd.edu.sg/cs/EPPRD/cache/PT_BRAND_CLASSIC_TEMPLTE_FLUID_1_PAPPBR_THEME_FLUID_1.css @charset "utf-8"; #ptbr_header_container #pthdr2container { background-image: linear-gradient= (rgb(57, 106, 144), rgb(23, 54, 81)); height: 40px; min-width: 550px; text-= align: center; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(141, 179, 223); color: rgba(255= , 255, 255, 0.95); background-color: transparent; } .homePageHdr #ptbr_header_container #pthdr2container { border-bottom: 1px s= olid rgb(23, 54, 81); } #pthdr2logofluid { display: none; } .homePageHdr #pthdr2logofluid { display: block; } .homePageHdr #pthdr2logofluid::before { left: 8px; position: relative; righ= t: 0px; top: 8px; float: left; } .psc_form-xlarge .homePageHdr #pthdr2logofluid::before, .psc_form-large .ho= mePageHdr #pthdr2logofluid::before, .psc_form-medium .homePageHdr #pthdr2lo= gofluid::before { content: url(""); } .psc_form-small .homePageHdr #pthdr2logofluid::before { content: url(""); } @media only screen and (orientation: portrait) { .psc_form-large .homePageHdr #pthdr2logofluid::before, .psc_form-medium .= homePageHdr #pthdr2logofluid::before { transform: scale(1.3); padding-left:= 1.5em; padding-top: 0.3em; } } @media only screen and (orientation: portrait) { .psc_form-small .homePageHdr #pthdr2logofluid::before { transform: scale(= 2.7); padding-left: 1.5em; padding-top: 1.2em; } } @media only screen and (orientation: landscape) { .psc_form-small .homePageHdr #pthdr2logofluid::before { transform: scale(= 1.5); padding-left: 0.7em; padding-top: 0.3em; } } #pthdr2navbarlinks.pthdr2navbarlinks { position: absolute; top: 0px; right:= 0px; } #pthdr2links.pthdr2links { display: none; } #pthdr2perslinks.pthdr2perslinks { white-space: nowrap; vertical-align: mid= dle; text-align: right; padding: 0px 0.5em; } #pthdr2perslinks.pthdr2perslinks .pttablinks { display: inline-block; margi= n: 0.5em 0px 0.5em 2em; white-space: nowrap; } #pthomepagetabline { background-image: url("/cs/EPPRD/cache/PT_HOME_TAB_LIN= E_CSS_1.JPG"); height: 26px; margin-top: 4px; } #pthomepagetabline ul { list-style: none; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } #pthomepagetabline li { float: left; margin: 0px 0.5em; padding: 3px 1em 0p= x; height: 20px; display: inline-block; border-color: rgb(201, 206, 213); b= order-style: solid; border-width: 0px 1px; } .PSPAGE { margin-left: 0px !important; margin-right: 0px; } #pthdr2search, #pthdr2notify_div, #pthdr2ActionList_div, #pthdr2navbar_div = { display: inline-block; padding-top: 7px; position: relative; } #pthdr2home { display: inline; } #pthdr2navbar_div #pthdr2navbar { border-left: 1px solid rgb(50, 81, 107); = } #pthdr2navbarlinks a.headerbutton .oj-treeview-list, .oj-treeview-list ul, .oj-tree-node { display: block; ma= rgin: 0px; padding: 0px; list-style-type: none; } .oj-tree-node { min-height: 1.833em; white-space: nowrap; min-width: 18px; = vertical-align: middle; } html:not([dir=3D"rtl"]) .oj-tree-node { margin-left: 18px; } html[dir=3D"rtl"] .oj-tree-node { margin-right: 18px; } html:not([dir=3D"rtl"]) .oj-treeview-list > .oj-tree-node { margin-left: 0p= x; } html[dir=3D"rtl"] .oj-treeview-list > .oj-tree-node { margin-right: 0px; } .oj-treeview-list ul > li:first-child { margin-top: 4px; } .oj-treeview-list a {
